queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of loan duration in months on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of default: Statistical evaluation of how the absence of a checking account influences credit risk drivers.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: Empirical investigation into the risk-reducing effect of a critical credit history or multiple existing credits on borrower default likelihood.
